/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libmotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/motor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_msgs/msg/detail/motor_command__description.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_msgs/msg/detail/motor_command__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_msgs/msg/detail/motor_command__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_msgs/msg/detail/encoder_data__description.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_msgs/msg/detail/encoder_data__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_msgs/msg/detail/encoder_data__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
